title: Beille 2pc Cream Terry Quilted Oven Mitts Set Baking Supplies, 14 Inch Length

Beille 2pc Cream Terry Quilted Oven Mitts Set Baking Supplies, 14 Inch Length

A kitchen staple, elevated. The Beille 2pc Terry Oven Mitts Set in off white, cream color bring everyday function and soft, neutral style to any kitchen. Made with a plush terry cloth quilted interior and exterior for added structure and comfort, these long oven mitts offer reliable protection whether you’re pulling out a hot casserole or lifting a fresh pie from the oven.

Key Features

  • 2PC QUILTED OVEN MITTS: Whether you're baking, roasting or cooking on the stovetop, these long quilted oven mitts are a must have for any home kitchen! Made from soft yet thick terry cloth, they provide a comfortable grip while helping to shield hands and forearms from heat
  • 14 INCH EXTENDED LENGTH: Longer arm coverage helps protect wrists and forearms from heat and splatter, perfect for reaching into deep ovens or over hot cookware or bakeware; these oven mitts are one size fits all, designed with a universal fit that’s comfortable for hands of all sizes
  • FARMHOUSE DECOR: Creamy, off white color complements any kitchen aesthetic: minimal, modern, or rustic; textured exterior and interior woven terry cloth material provides a cozy, flexible grip while adding a warm and cozy touch to any kitchen
  • HANGING LOOP: Built in hanging loop adds a thoughtful touch of convenience; easily hang the oven mitts on a hook to keep them within arm ’s reach, no drawer digging required! The loop also makes them perfect for open display, adding a cozy, functional accent to kitchen décor
  • EASY CARE: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle with like colors; lay flat to air dry; Do not machine dry, bleach or iron

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLE-H9RQW7XV
  • UPC: 810131709266
  • Color: Cream
  • Size: One Size

Each quilted oven mitt measures 14 inches in length, offering extended coverage to shield your hands and lower arms from heat. The soft yet durable design fits most hands comfortably and securely, making the oven mitts a must have tool for cooking, baking, and hosting alike!

Beautifully simple and thoughtfully designed, these oven mitts blend seamlessly into any kitchen. Pair them with your favorite Beille kitchen tools for a cohesive, consciously curated space. Machine washable and made to withstand repeated use, this terry oven mitt set combines practicality with an inviting kitchen aesthetic. Reliable, stylish, and always ready to handle the heat.
